messenger_inbox_subset.text: [action] {"negotiation_op": "session_request", "proposed_participants": ["Riley Carter", "Jordan Hayes"], "purpose": "Coordinate your produce needs: delivery windows, freshness preferences, selection, and service expectations."}

[private to ['Riley Carter']]  said: "Thanks for moving quickly, Riley. I’ve got you confirmed at 178 today—one-seven-eight. I’ll pull from this morning’s pick, greens on top with chill packs. I can deliver 11:30-12:00; if you prefer earlier, 10:45 works. We’ll do a quick on-site freshness check. For payment, same-day transfer on drop-off or EOD invoice—what’s your preference?"

[private to ['Riley Carter']]  said: "Riley, thanks again. I’ve got you set for today at 11:30–12:00; I can also do 10:45 if earlier works better. I’ll pull from this morning’s pick with chill packs and we’ll do a quick freshness check on arrival. Total is 178. Do you want payment on drop-off or EOD invoice, and can you confirm the drop-off point and any access notes?"
